title: 数字经济
subtitle: Digital Economy, E-commerce, Digital Transformation
assistant_message: Learn to discuss the digital economy, e-commerce trends, and digital transformation of businesses.

examples.chinese: 随着数字经济的发展，传统行业面临转型压力。
examples.translation: Along with the development of the digital economy, traditional industries face transformation pressure.
examples.translation_id: Seiring dengan perkembangan ekonomi digital, industri tradisional menghadapi tekanan transformasi.

examples.chinese: 数字经济不仅创造了新业态，而且改变了人们的生活方式。
examples.translation: The digital economy has not only created new business formats but also changed people's lifestyles.
examples.translation_id: Ekonomi digital tidak hanya menciptakan format bisnis baru tetapi juga mengubah gaya hidup masyarakat.

examples.chinese: 从现金支付到移动支付，支付方式发生了巨大变化。
examples.translation: From cash payment to mobile payment, payment methods have undergone enormous changes.
examples.translation_id: Dari pembayaran tunai ke pembayaran seluler, metode pembayaran telah mengalami perubahan besar.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Shen Wei
dialogue.chinese: 随着数字经济的发展，传统行业面临转型压力。你觉得企业应该如何应对？
dialogue.pinyin: Suízhe shùzì jīngjì de fāzhǎn, chuántǒng hángyè miànlín zhuǎnxíng yālì. Nǐ juéde qǐyè yīnggāi rúhé yìngduì?
dialogue.translation: Along with the development of the digital economy, traditional industries face transformation pressure. How do you think companies should respond?
dialogue.translation_id: Seiring dengan perkembangan ekonomi digital, industri tradisional menghadapi tekanan transformasi. Bagaimana menurut Anda perusahaan harus merespons?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhang Yun
dialogue.chinese: 数字经济不仅创造了新业态，而且改变了人们的生活方式。企业需要拥抱数字化转型。
dialogue.pinyin: Shùzì jīngjì bùjǐn chuàngzàole xīn yètài, érqiě gǎibiànle rénmen de shēnghuó fāngshì. Qǐyè xūyào yōngbào shùzì huà zhuǎnxíng.
dialogue.translation: The digital economy has not only created new business formats but also changed people's lifestyles. Companies need to embrace digital transformation.
dialogue.translation_id: Ekonomi digital tidak hanya menciptakan format bisnis baru tetapi juga mengubah gaya hidup masyarakat. Perusahaan perlu merangkul transformasi digital.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Shen Wei
dialogue.chinese: 数字化转型会带来哪些机遇和挑战？
dialogue.pinyin: Shùzì huà zhuǎnxíng huì dài lái nǎxiē jīyù hé tiǎozhàn?
dialogue.translation: What opportunities and challenges will digital transformation bring?
dialogue.translation_id: Peluang dan tantangan apa yang akan dibawa oleh transformasi digital?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Zhang Yun
dialogue.chinese: 从现金支付到移动支付，支付方式发生了巨大变化。电商平台为中小企业提供了新机遇，但也带来了数据安全等挑战。
dialogue.pinyin: Cóng xiànjīn zhīfù dào yídòng zhīfù, zhīfù fāngshì fāshēngle jùdà biànhuà. Diànshāng píngtái wèi zhōng xiǎo qǐyè tígōngle xīn jīyù, dàn yě dài láile shùjù ānquán děng tiǎozhàn.
dialogue.translation: From cash payment to mobile payment, payment methods have undergone enormous changes. E-commerce platforms provide new opportunities for small and medium enterprises, but also bring challenges such as data security.
dialogue.translation_id: Dari pembayaran tunai ke pembayaran seluler, metode pembayaran telah mengalami perubahan besar. Platform e-dagang memberikan peluang baru bagi usaha kecil dan menengah, tetapi juga membawa tantangan seperti keamanan data.

exercises.question: What does 数字经济 (shùzì jīngjì) mean?
How to say 'mobile payment' in Chinese?
Complete: 数字经济不仅创造了新业态，______改变了人们的生活方式。
